description_long: This lantern features a robust, industrial design with a cylindrical central body encased between two thick, octagonal plates at the top and bottom. Four sturdy vertical rods connect the plates, providing structural support and a modern aesthetic. The central body appears to be made of a solid, light-colored material with subtle horizontal banding, and a circular access panel or lens is visible on one side. The top and bottom plates are darker in color, likely metal, and the overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance. The lantern's design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements, focusing on function and strength for urban environments.
description: A sturdy, cylindrical lantern with a light central body, dark octagonal plates, and four vertical support rods, exuding an industrial, functional style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular access panel or lens on the central body, framed by the four vertical rods and octagonal plates.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the smooth, uninterrupted cylindrical body with horizontal bands, lacking the circular panel seen in the front.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the symmetry and solid construction of the lantern.
description_view_3: Rear view mirrors the side views, with the cylindrical body and support rods visible, but no access panel or lens.
